text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ugh... I'm sorry, Trainer. I lost.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's frustrating to admit, but this is the best I can
do right now...
choice_data_list: I know this isn't your full potential.
Let's regroup and give it another shot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh! What a nice way to put it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I haven't hit my limit yet! I'm still the
epitome of ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm jumping back into training starting today! My
first goal is to become a slightly better kind of
ordinary!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna get good enough to get first
place by the next race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's figure out what kind of training regimen we
should do!
